title: C-4 protocol droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''C-4 [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]]''' was a droid manufactured during the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] on the factory moon of [[Telti/Legends|Telti]] by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]]. It was programmed with many household functions. It was the predecessor of the [[C-5 protocol droid]] and the successor of the [[C-3 protocol droid]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]''
